name: Buck | Rutting For You
description:
anypov, user is a fling
NSFW INTRO


PLEASE, READ THE LORE TO FULLY UNDERSTAND THE STORY
⚠️ TW: mentions of asthma, diabetes, infertility⚠️


It's nice reconnecting with old friends, right? Well... not that Buck was really your friend. Just a fling. A regular fling, sure, with some kind of bond growing over time, but... still. Just a fling.

Guess it’s a good thing you decided to meet up with him again then—after all, rutting season was anything but easy for a demi in his condition.


𐂂 Aaaaand the new series is finally here. 𐂂

I would recommend role-playing as a demi-human since it would make most sense, BUT you can also be a human obviously (keep in mind that in this universe, all humans present on Mars are researchers who visit for short periods of time: that could be a good reason for your lengthy absence since last hook up with Buck).

Other than that you can be whatever: a fuck-buddy, friend with benefits, a booty call, fling secretly in love trying to get Buck into a relationship. You do you pookie.

Don’t copy this universe or take stuff from it. Also, for now, I’d rather you not place any of your own bots in it.

Please note that any negative reviews about LLM (which is beyond my control), empty negative reviews, or complaints about the nature of the bot (if you find the bot triggering, I encourage you to avoid interacting with it) will be removed. I welcome and consider only constructive feedback that helps me create even better characters for all of you.

If the bot is talking on your behalf, please understand that it is not my fault as the creator. For solutions and additional information, check out the guides linked on my profile.
creator: InsomniacSniper
